data.name: BodyMetricsAlreadyExists
data.value: Body metrics are already registered for this user.

data.name: InvalidBodyMetricsData
data.value: The provided body metrics data is not valid.

data.name: BodyMetricsNotFound
data.value: No body metrics were found for this user.

data.name: InvalidWeightValue
data.value: The provided weight value is not valid.

data.name: InvalidMeasurementValues
data.value: The provided measurement values are not valid.

data.name: InvalidGoalData
data.value: The provided goal data is not valid.

data.name: BmiNotCalculated
data.value: BMI has not been calculated yet.

data.name: DailyCaloricGoalNotCalculated
data.value: Daily caloric goal has not been calculated yet.

data.name: InvalidDateOfBirthFormat
data.value: Invalid date of birth format. Expected yyyy-MM-dd.

data.name: NoActiveGoal
data.value: No active health goal is set for this user.

data.name: TdeeNotCalculated
data.value: TDEE has not been calculated yet for this user.

data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing the request.

data.name: BodyMetricsNotFoundTitle
data.value: Body Metrics Not Found

data.name: BodyMetricsAlreadyExistsTitle
data.value: Body Metrics Already Exist

data.name: InvalidBodyMetricsDataTitle
data.value: Invalid Body Metrics Data

data.name: InvalidWeightValueTitle
data.value: Invalid Weight Value

data.name: InvalidMeasurementValuesTitle
data.value: Invalid Measurement Values

data.name: InvalidGoalDataTitle
data.value: Invalid Goal Data

data.name: NoActiveGoalTitle
data.value: No Active Goal

data.name: TdeeNotCalculatedTitle
data.value: TDEE Not Calculated

data.name: UnexpectedServerError
data.value: Unexpected Server Error

data.name: InvalidDateOfBirthFormatTitle
data.value: Invalid Date Of Birth Format

data.name: BmiNotCalculatedTitle
data.value: BMI Not Calculated

data.name: DailyCaloricGoalNotCalculatedTitle
data.value: Daily Caloric Goal Not Calculated
